title: Cartography (machine-checkable extract)
description: JSON sidecar for CARTOGRAPHY.md. The contextual map: terrain shape, relevant elements with ground-truth authority, invariants, risks, unknowns. Prose annotations stay in CARTOGRAPHY.md.

socratic.description: OPTIONAL. The cartographer's canonical 4-key socratic block (result of the FORK.COUNTER.ADMIT.PIVOT.RESIDUAL self-interrogation over the map's load-bearing claim), same shape as debrief/verify. When present, validate_run.py's I13 check requires `counter` to record an OUTCOME (rejects blank/'n/a'). This is the schema-enforced landing place for the cartographer's socratic residue (D-07): the cartographer produces no debrief.json, so the block lives here.
